rows.label: xs33910100_MSG0010
rows.name: Mo-mo! We can't get close like this, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33910100_MSG0020
rows.name: Lin, do you think you can unlock it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33910100_MSG0050
rows.name:
It has multiple layers of protection.
Forcing it open will take time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33910100_MSG0060
rows.name:
Actually, it may be faster to look for
the barrier's release key itself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33910100_MSG0080
rows.name:
We should assume the Galdrs from
earlier have the release key.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33910100_MSG0090
rows.name:
So they scattered to keep the
release key out of our hands?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33910100_MSG0110
rows.name:
Tatsu won't let them run off with it,
mo! Let's chase them right away, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33910100_MSG0120
rows.name:
Yeah! Once we find them, let's beat
them and take the release key![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33910100_MSG0130
rows.name: That's Lin-san for you, mo! So ruthless, mo![ST:wait ]
